parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: $json.success, status: $json.status, job_id: $json.job_id, lead_id: $json.lead_id, quote_id: $json.quote_id, invoice_id: $json.invoice_id, final_invoice_amount: $json.final_invoice_amount, quote_variance: $json.quote_variance, accuracy_score: $json.accuracy_score, material_count: $json.material_count, missing_information: $json.missing_information } }}
